title: Add RapidFuzz scorecard and score search to execute_tactus
description: Implement plexus.scorecards.search and plexus.score.search in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py using rapidfuzz.process.extract + WRatio. Score search ranks scores across scorecards (configurable scorecard_limit). Wire DIRECT_HANDLERS, HELPER_BINDINGS, optional ctor injectors. Unit tests with monkeypatched GraphQL. Update documentation/agent/mcp/read-apis.md and console builtin prompt (v1.6.0).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Shipped: plexus.scorecards.search + plexus.score.search in execute.py (RapidFuzz WRatio). DIRECT_HANDLERS, HELPER_BINDINGS, ctor injectors scorecards_searcher/score_searcher. Unit tests for ranking, cross-scorecard filter, facade loopback, wrap snippet. Console builtin 1.6.0 prompt + read-apis.md + EXECUTE_TACTUS_DESCRIPTION. 114 pytest green (execute_test + test_builtin_procedures).
